name: Telegram bot companion product spec
description: Product-only spec for the Telegram bot companion surface: option-first commands, confirmed AI expense capture, guided stats/budget flows, household invites, notifications, settings, out-of-scope boundaries, and MVP/later release shape.

Record docs-only harness evidence and progress.
verification: Readback confirmed docs/product-specs/tma/telegram-bot-companion.md contains product-only Telegram bot companion behavior, command/menu flows, notification settings, out-of-scope boundaries, and release shape.
